creator: patrick@pine.nl
text:
I see the same problem, but a but weirder. I have 2 network modules  
in the 1955.
Only one seems to be recognized.
em0 is on pass-through module 3 of the blade.
em1 shows up but cannot be used, I suspect it to be located on the  
fourth pass-through
module of the chassis, but we have only 3 of those so I cannot test it.
